basic_details.job_title: DHS Nicobars Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Public Health Nurse & TBHV-NTEP Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society, Nicobar District (DHS Nicobars) has published the Public Health Nurse (PHN) & TBHV-NTEP Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. M-17030(11)/77/2024-O/O DHS-DCNIC-DCNIC_AN. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Public Health Nurse (PHN) & TBHV-NTEP positions. Candidates holding qualifications such as 12th-pass, Diploma, or Any Graduate in relevant disciplines are eligible to apply through offline mode at Andaman & Nicobar Administration Official Website. The application process will remain active up to 13-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Public Health Nurse (PHN): All India Senior School Certificate Examination (10+2) or equivalent. Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (3 1/2 years). One year Diploma in Public Health Nursing or Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) degree (4 year) from a recognized university or board and registered with the Nursing Council of India. TBHV-NTEP: Graduate in science OR Intermediate (10+2) in science and experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/Health worker/Certificate OR Higher course in Health Education/Counselling OR Tuberculosis health visitor's recognized course. Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months). Preferential: Training course for MPW or recognized sanitary inspector course.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 21,632/- for Public Health Nurse and Rs. 18,434/- for TBHV-NTEP

selection_process: Selection of candidates will be on the merit of candidate qualifications and experience
and a merit list will be prepared. Merit list will be published in The Daily Telegram
AN Website and simultaneously displayed on the notice board of the DHS-Nicobar District for claims and objections
with a grace period of 7 days.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Nicobars Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: andamannicobar.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Nicobars recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the DHS Nicobars recruitment is 13th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Public Health Nurse (PHN) and TBHV-NTEP posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies. 3 posts are for Public Health Nurse (PHN) and 2 posts are for TBHV-NTEP.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Public Health Nurse (PHN) post?
faq.answer: For the PHN post, candidates need to have completed 10+2 or equivalent, a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (3 1/2 years), and a one-year Diploma in Public Health Nursing or a Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) degree (4 year).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the TBHV-NTEP post?
faq.answer: The salary for the TBHV-NTEP post is Rs. 18,434/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form should be addressed to the Chairperson (DC), District Health Society, Nicobar District – 744301, with the name of the post clearly mentioned.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the merit of the candidate's qualifications and experience. A merit list will be prepared and published.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
